questionHtml:
Which alcohol would produce a carboxylic acid when heated with acidified potassium dichromate(VI)?

A. propan-2-ol

B. butan-1-ol

C. 2-methylpropan-2-ol

D. pentan-3-ol

meta.title: Which alcohol would produce a carboxylic acid when heated with acidified potassium dichromate(VI)? A. propan-2-ol B. butan-1-ol C. 2-methylpropan-2-ol D. pentan-3-ol
